sn26.9:1.1: At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, the arising, continuation, production, and manifestation of the earth element … of the water element … of the heat element … of the air element … of the space element … of the consciousness element is the arising of suffering, the continuation of disease, the manifestation of aging-and-death.
sn26.9:1.2: "The cessation, subsiding, and passing away of the earth element … of the consciousness element is the cessation of suffering, the subsiding of disease, the passing away of aging-and-death."
